title: UK warship HMS Dragon heads to Middle East for potential Strait of Hormuz mission
summary_full: The Ministry of Defence says the ship will prepare to join an international mission to safeguard shipping, but only when fighting in the region ends.
summary_public: The Ministry of Defence says the ship will prepare to join an international mission to safeguard shipping, but only when fighting in the region ends.
